text: I never find new music. Spotify discovery is completely broken and stale.
Recommendations keep repeating the same artists every single day.
Discover Weekly used to be great but now it feels repetitive.
The algorithm is awful. I want to explore new genres but get the same playlists.
Love Spotify Premium. Best app for listening to my favorite songs.
Great sound quality and easy to use. No complaints.
Works fine for playing albums I already know.
Decent app. I mostly listen to the same playlist on commute.
Shuffle mode is frustrating when I want to hear a full album in order.
Amazing recommendations lately, found so many new artists.
